instruction: Help me organize the department expenses

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Department'
ws['B1'] = 'Travel(CNY)'
ws['C1'] = 'Office(CNY)'
ws['D1'] = 'Entertainment(CNY)'
ws['A2'] = 'Sales Dept'
ws['B2'] = 18500
ws['C2'] = 3200
ws['D2'] = 8600
ws['A3'] = 'Tech Dept'
ws['B3'] = 5200
ws['C3'] = 12800
ws['D3'] = 1200
ws['A4'] = 'Admin Dept'
ws['B4'] = 2100
ws['C4'] = 6500
ws['D4'] = 4300
ws['A5'] = 'Marketing Dept'
ws['B5'] = 22000
ws['C5'] = 4100
ws['D5'] = 15200
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/expense_report.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me organize the department expenses
Calculate the total expense for Marketing Dept from /home/user/Desktop/expense_report.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/expense_memo.txt: 'Marketing Dept Total Expense: 41300 CNY', save
